title: Authentication bypass in Microsoft Agent 365 Trigger via forged identity instead of JWT validation
description: The Microsoft Agent 365 Trigger webhook handler never validated the inbound Bot Framework token. Instead of verifying the incoming JWT, it hardcoded a fabricated authenticated principal onto the request (`req.user = { aud, appid, azp: credentials.clientId }`) and then handed the request straight to `agent.adapter.process`, which trusts that identity. As a result an unauthenticated attacker who knew the webhook URL could submit a forged payload and have the workflow execute with attacker-controlled data as if it came from a legitimately authenticated Microsoft caller.
